name: GOLO Mobile Inc.
summary: GOLO Mobile Inc. operates a mobile and web-based order ahead platform for pick-up and delivery. It delivers food, pharmacy, grocery, dry cleaning, flowers, and other hard goods for individuals working and/or living in locations, such as airports, office towers, condo towers, hotels, hospitals, large venues, and convention centers. The company is headquartered in Montreal, Canada. GOLO Mobile Inc. is a subsidiary of Paysafe Group Limited.
